page_subtitle: Operational architect. Marketing strategist. The person who sees the gaps you can't — because they live inside your own head.
bio_headline: I don't create templates. I create operational freedom.
bio_p1: The Bold Face Co is for solopreneurs, creator-adjacent business owners, small local service businesses, and solo-service owners who are excellent at their craft — but tired of running their business from their text messages, memory, and voicemails.
bio_p2: If you're tired of the 14-hour days, surviving on caffeine and screenshots, you've come to the right place.
bio_p3: I've spent years in project management, people management, digital marketing, branding, and social media strategy. But here's what I kept noticing: the freelancers I worked with weren't failing because they lacked talent or clients. They were stalling because they had zero business infrastructure.
bio_p4: Every client felt custom. Every workflow lived in their head. They couldn't delegate, couldn't scale, and couldn't take a day off without everything grinding to a halt.
cta_headline: Let's build something that doesn't need you to run it.
cta_text: Whether you need a one-on-one strategy session or a plug-and-play system — I've got both.
